title: Easy Shulker Box Cutter 🪚
description: 🪚 Craft any Shulker Box directly in the Stonecutter for fast and easy storage upgrades!
body:
**🪚 Easy Shulker Box Cutter**

Tired of crafting shulker boxes the old way?
Easy Shulker Box Cutter makes storage upgrades faster and easier!

With this mod, you can craft any color of Shulker Box directly in the Stonecutter. No extra recipes, no hassle—just drop in your materials and cut your way to better storage.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**Features:**

🪚 Craft all Shulker Box variants in the Stonecutter

🎨 Supports every shulker box color

⚡ Simple, vanilla-friendly, and lightweight

📦 Perfect for builders, storage lovers, and QoL modpacks

Upgrade your storage the easy way—cut, craft, and store!

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49f6266057fcc11b5c2771c9769d99c6f6821329.png)



![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
